hero.headline: Amrita Online MBA in ESG: Syllabus, Fees and Career Outcomes
hero.sub: NAAC A++ | NIRF #8 University 2025 | Grant Thornton co-branded | WES recognised

sections.tldr: Amrita Online MBA in Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) is co-branded with Grant Thornton and covers ESG in business sustainability, ESG in investment, ESG analytics, ESG in key industries, and ESG risk and compliance. Total tuition Rs 1,96,000 (semester fee Rs 49,000). Plus Rs 700 registration and Rs 11,000 exam fees. Total cost of programme Rs 2,07,700. Zero-cost EMI available directly through the university. NAAC A++. NIRF #8 University 2025. No other UGC-DEB online MBA offers a dedicated ESG specialisation.

about.body:
Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) is one of the most significant emerging specialisations in global business education - and Amrita is the only UGC-DEB approved online university offering ESG as a dedicated MBA specialisation in India. SEBI's BRSR (Business Responsibility and Sustainability Reporting) mandate, green bond market growth, and corporate ESG reporting obligations are creating a generation of roles that did not exist five years ago.

Amrita's MBA in ESG is co-branded with Grant Thornton - the global advisory firm that leads ESG assurance, sustainability reporting, and ESG due diligence for India's largest companies. Students receive certifications from both Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham and Grant Thornton, covering ESG in business strategy, ESG in investment portfolios, ESG analytics, ESG across key industries, and ESG risk management and compliance.

Amrita holds NIRF #8 University 2025 and NAAC A++ - India's highest accreditation grade. WES recognition gives the degree formal equivalence in the USA and Canada, relevant for candidates targeting international ESG roles as global sustainability reporting standards converge. The Study Abroad option includes exchanges at Oakland University (USA), University of New Mexico (USA), Institut Mines Telecom (France), and University of Barcelona (Spain).

For India's first generation of ESG managers, Amrita's ESG MBA is the only online UGC-DEB path available. EdifyEdu verifies data independently and takes no commission from any university.

syllabus.note: Sem 1-2 subjects are shared across all Amrita MBA specialisations. Sem 3-4 below are specific to the ESG specialisation.

subjects.name: International Business
subjects.desc: Global trade frameworks, cross-border market entry strategies, FDI analysis, and managing international operations.

subjects.name: Business Analytics and Business Modelling
subjects.desc: Quantitative business modelling, regression analysis, forecasting techniques, and data-driven decision-making frameworks.

subjects.name: ESG in Business Sustainability
subjects.desc: ESG framework integration in corporate strategy, materiality assessment, BRSR and GRI reporting standards, and stakeholder engagement.

subjects.name: ESG in Investment
subjects.desc: ESG scoring methodologies, sustainable and responsible investing frameworks, SRI fund design, and ESG-linked bond analysis.

subjects.name: Education for Life
subjects.desc: Soft skills development, mindfulness, health and wellbeing, and holistic personal effectiveness for professionals.

subjects.name: Environment Sustainability and Governance
subjects.desc: ESG reporting frameworks, corporate sustainability strategy, carbon accounting basics, and regulatory governance obligations.

subjects.name: Project
subjects.desc: Applied ESG industry project - typically a company ESG assessment, BRSR report, or sustainability strategy proposal.

subjects.name: ESG in Key Industries
subjects.desc: Sector-specific ESG challenges and opportunities in energy, manufacturing, BFSI, real estate, and retail industries.

subjects.name: ESG Analytics
subjects.desc: ESG data collection, carbon footprint calculation, TCFD reporting, Scope 1-2-3 emissions accounting, and ESG metrics dashboard design.

subjects.name: ESG Risk Management and Compliance
subjects.desc: ESG risk identification and quantification, SEBI BRSR compliance, regulatory scenario analysis, and ESG due diligence for M&A.

whoHires.body:
ESG MBA graduates from Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham Online are hired across India's sustainability and corporate governance sector:

**Industries:** ESG consulting (Big-4 and Grant Thornton sustainability practices), ESG rating agencies, investment management (ESG integration teams), corporate sustainability departments, banks (green finance), and SEBI-regulated listed companies with BRSR obligations

**Entry-level roles:** ESG Analyst, Sustainability Coordinator, BRSR Reporting Analyst, ESG Research Associate, Green Finance Analyst, Corporate Governance Associate

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years experience):** ESG Manager, Sustainability Manager, BRSR Compliance Manager, ESG Investment Analyst, Corporate Sustainability Head, ESG Risk Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** Chief Sustainability Officer, VP ESG, Head of Sustainable Finance, Director ESG Advisory (consulting), VP Corporate Governance, ESG Director (listed company)

**Top hiring organisations:** Grant Thornton Sustainability Practice, Deloitte Sustainability, KPMG ESG, EY Climate Change, McKinsey Sustainability, MSCI ESG Research, Sustainalytics India, NSE Indices ESG, BSE Sustainability, SEBI-listed companies with BRSR mandate (Nifty 500), and green bond issuers across BFSI

skills.body:
The ESG specialisation builds skills that sustainability consulting, ESG investment, and corporate sustainability employers test at analyst and manager levels:

**Technical skills:**
- ESG Reporting: GRI Standards implementation, BRSR mandatory disclosure preparation, TCFD aligned climate reporting, integrated reporting framework, and ESG KPI definition
- ESG Analytics: Scope 1, 2, and 3 greenhouse gas accounting, carbon footprint calculation methodology, ESG data platform usage (Bloomberg ESG, MSCI ESG), and sustainability metrics dashboard design
- ESG in Investment: ESG screening methodologies (negative, positive, best-in-class), ESG integration in portfolio construction, green bond issuance criteria, and social impact bond design
- ESG Risk and Compliance: SEBI BRSR compliance checklist, physical and transition climate risk identification, ESG due diligence in M&A, and regulatory scenario analysis

**Applied skills:**
- Industry ESG Application: sector-specific materiality mapping for energy, manufacturing, BFSI, and retail, and industry ESG benchmark analysis
- Stakeholder Communication: ESG shareholder engagement, sustainability report writing for public disclosure, and ESG rating agency questionnaire management

**Soft skills:** Presenting ESG strategy to boards and institutional investors, managing cross-functional sustainability data collection teams, communicating climate risk in financial language to CFOs and treasurers, and building ESG culture across non-sustainability business functions.

comparisons.body:
Comparing Amrita Online MBA ESG against peer programmes:

**No direct UGC-DEB online MBA peer:** As of 2026, no other UGC-DEB approved online MBA university in India offers a dedicated ESG specialisation. Amrita with Grant Thornton co-branding is the only UGC-DEB path for working professionals who want both the recognised management degree and ESG domain depth on the marksheet.

**vs IIM Bangalore campus Sustainability Management electives:** IIM Bangalore and other IIMs offer sustainability-adjacent electives within full-time campus MBA programmes. These require full-time campus attendance, entrance examination, and fee structures above Rs 10,00,000+. For working ESG professionals who cannot leave their roles, Amrita's online MBA is the only path to a recognised management credential with ESG specialisation.

**vs TERI SAS campus programmes in Sustainability Management:** TERI School of Advanced Studies offers campus-based sustainability management programmes at New Delhi. These require full-time attendance and do not carry UGC-DEB entitled degree status equivalent to an MBA. Amrita's UGC-DEB entitled online MBA provides the recognised degree credential with Grant Thornton co-branding that TERI campus programmes cannot match for working professionals.

fees.body:
The Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham Online MBA in Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) carries a tuition fee of Rs 1,96,000 total across 4 semesters (2-year programme).

**Mandatory fees (all students, disclose before enrolment):**
- Registration fee: Rs 700 (one-time)
- Examination fee: Rs 2,750 per semester x 4 = Rs 11,000 total
- **Total cost of programme: Rs 1,96,000 + Rs 700 + Rs 11,000 = Rs 2,07,700**

**Payment options for Indian students:**
- Semester fee: Rs 49,000 per semester
- Annual fee with 5% discount: Rs 93,100 per year
- Zero-cost EMI: available directly through Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham (contact counsellor for current monthly instalment and tenure options)

**Foreign national students:**
Contact our counsellor for foreign national tuition track applicable to the ESG specialisation.

Fees listed are indicative. EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with Amrita each quarter. Please reconfirm with our counsellor before any payment.

certificate.body:
Graduates receive an Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham MBA degree certificate with ESG noted on the marksheet, along with Grant Thornton co-branded ESG certifications. This is the only UGC-DEB entitled online MBA with ESG as a standalone specialisation on the degree certificate in India.

NAAC A++ and NIRF #8 University 2025 give the credential the institutional weight required for ESG roles at listed companies, ESG consulting firms, and sustainable investment houses. WES recognition gives formal degree equivalence in the USA and Canada - relevant as global ESG reporting standards (ISSB, CSRD) create international ESG career pathways. DigiLocker verification is available.

reviews.intro: Three verified reviews from Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham Online MBA ESG alumni. Ratings reflect individual experience.

items.name: Nandita P.
items.liked: Grant Thornton ESG certification alongside Amrita's NAAC A++ degree was the only combination available in the online MBA space
items.disliked: ESG regulations are evolving fast - some BRSR content was updated mid-programme which caused confusion about which version applied to assignments
items.body: I work in the sustainability reporting team at a Nifty 500 company. The ESG Analytics and ESG Risk Management subjects were directly applicable to the BRSR mandatory disclosures I prepare. Grant Thornton co-branding in ESG is unique - no other online MBA offers this. NAAC A++ from NIRF #8 cleared the educational credential filter at every ESG consulting firm I approached. The fact that no other online MBA offers ESG on the marksheet made Amrita the only option.

items.name: Rajan S.
items.liked: ESG in Investment subject was highly applicable for green bond analysis work at my firm
items.disliked: Placement support in Delhi NCR for ESG roles was limited - the programme's career network is stronger in South India
items.body: I manage green finance products at a private bank in Delhi. The ESG in Investment and ESG Risk Management subjects were directly applicable to the green bond and sustainability-linked loan structuring I do. Grant Thornton ESG certification added advisory credibility to my profile with institutional investors. Zero-cost EMI from the university was straightforward. Only concern was limited ESG placement support in North India markets.

items.name: Divya K.
items.liked: Carbon accounting and Scope 1-2-3 emissions module was the most practically applicable content for corporate sustainability roles
items.disliked: TCFD reporting content was thorough but would benefit from updated case studies on Indian companies post the 2024 SEBI BRSR amendments
items.body: I transitioned from a corporate finance role to a CSO-office position using this ESG MBA. Scope 1-2-3 emissions accounting, BRSR disclosure preparation, and ESG materiality assessment were directly applicable. The fact that Amrita is the only online MBA with ESG on the marksheet was decisive - I searched for 6 months before finding this programme. NAAC A++ and Grant Thornton certification gave it the institutional and advisory credibility I needed.

faqs.question: Is Amrita the only UGC-DEB online MBA with ESG as a standalone specialisation?
faqs.answer: As of 2026, yes. No other UGC-DEB approved online MBA university in India lists ESG or Sustainability Management as a dedicated MBA specialisation. For working professionals in corporate sustainability, ESG consulting, or sustainable finance who need a recognised management degree with ESG on the marksheet, Amrita with Grant Thornton co-branding is the only option.

faqs.question: What SEBI BRSR compliance content is covered in the ESG MBA?
faqs.answer: The ESG specialisation covers BRSR mandatory disclosure requirements for top 1000 listed companies, BRSR Core indicators, ESG KPI definition for BRSR reporting, assurance requirements, and SEBI's BRSR amendment history. The ESG Risk and Compliance subject also covers TCFD-aligned physical and transition climate risk reporting. Applicable for corporate sustainability, investor relations, and ESG audit roles.

faqs.question: How does Grant Thornton co-branding help in ESG careers?
faqs.answer: Grant Thornton is a leading ESG assurance and sustainability advisory firm in India. Their co-branded certification signals advisory-grade ESG competency to employers - distinguishing Amrita ESG MBA holders from candidates with standard management degrees and online sustainability courses. For ESG consulting, sustainability audit, and corporate ESG manager roles where advisory firm association carries weight, this is a genuine hiring differentiator.

faqs.question: What is the total cost of the Amrita ESG MBA including all fees?
faqs.answer: Total cost of programme is Rs 2,07,700 - comprising Rs 1,96,000 tuition, Rs 700 one-time registration, and Rs 11,000 examination fees (Rs 2,750 per semester across 4 semesters). Zero-cost EMI is available directly through Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham. Contact our counsellor for current monthly instalment and tenure options.

faqs.question: Is the Amrita ESG MBA valid for international ESG roles as global standards converge?
faqs.answer: Yes. WES recognition gives Amrita's MBA formal equivalence to a Canadian and American master's degree. As ISSB (International Sustainability Standards Board) and EU CSRD standards align with India's BRSR framework, ESG professionals with both a WES-recognised degree and Grant Thornton co-branding are positioned for cross-border ESG roles. The Study Abroad option at European and US partner universities adds international exposure.

chooseIf: You want the only UGC-DEB online MBA with ESG as a standalone specialisation on the degree certificate.
You work in corporate sustainability, ESG consulting, sustainable finance, or ESG auditing.
Grant Thornton ESG co-branding from NAAC A++, NIRF #8 is a career differentiator for your target roles.
WES recognition for international ESG careers as global standards converge is a priority.
consider: You can attend a campus programme and want IIMB or TERI's sustainability management depth (campus-based, not online).
You want a broader Finance MBA with ESG electives rather than a dedicated ESG specialisation.
Your target employers specifically require a general management MBA rather than a niche specialisation.
